final_sql:
WITH purchase_sessions AS (
  SELECT
    t1.*
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h30
  WHERE h30.value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL AND t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" >= 1
),
non_purchase_sessions AS (
  SELECT
    t1.*
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h30
  WHERE h30.value:"productRevenue" IS NULL AND t1."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" IS NULL
),
average_pageviews AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(t."date", 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    CASE 
      WHEN h30.value:"productRevenue" IS NOT NULL AND t."totals"::OBJECT:"transactions" >= 1 THEN 'purchase'
      ELSE 'non_purchase'
    END AS purchase_classification,
    AVG(h30.value:"page.pagePath") AS avg_pageviews
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430 AS t
  , LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t."hits") h30
  WHERE t."date" >= '20170401' AND t."date" <= '20170731'
  GROUP BY month, purchase_classification
)
SELECT
  month,
  purchase_classification,
  AVG(avg_pageviews) AS avg_pageviews
FROM average_pageviews
GROUP BY month, purchase_classification;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -45.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH youtube_visitors AS (
  SELECT
    t1.*
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170731 AS t1,
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h
  WHERE h.value:"page":"pagePath" ILIKE '%YouTube%'
),
product_quantities AS (
  SELECT
    h.value:"page":"pagePath" AS "product",
    SUM(h.value:"productRevenue") AS "total_quantity"
  FROM youtube_visitors,
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => youtube_visitors."hits") h
  WHERE h.value:"page":"pagePath" NOT ILIKE '%YouTube%'
  GROUP BY h.value:"page":"pagePath"
),
top_product AS (
  SELECT
    "product",
    "total_quantity"
  FROM product_quantities
  ORDER BY "total_quantity" DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  top_product."product",
  top_product."total_quantity"
FROM top_product;
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=cte_first) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH monthly_conversion_rates AS (
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', t7."date"::DATE) AS month,
  SUM(h.value:"addToCart") AS total_add_to_cart,
  SUM(h.value:"purchase") AS total_purchase,
  SUM(t.value:"pageviews") AS total_pageviews
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170430 AS t7
, LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t7."totals") t
, LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t7."hits") h
WHERE t7."date" >= '20170101' AND t7."date" <= '20170331'
GROUP BY month
)
SELECT
  month,
  total_add_to_cart,
  total_purchase,
  total_pageviews,
  CASE 
    WHEN total_pageviews > 0 THEN (total_add_to_cart::FLOAT / total_pageviews) * 100 
    ELSE 0 
  END AS add_to_cart_conversion_rate,
  CASE 
    WHEN total_pageviews > 0 THEN (total_purchase::FLOAT / total_pageviews) * 100 
    ELSE 0 
  END AS purchase_conversion_rate
FROM monthly_conversion_rates
ORDER BY month ASC;
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=flatten_first) scored -50.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH inventor_counts AS (
  SELECT
    FLOOR((t1."publication_date" / 10000) - 1960) / 5 * 5 + 1960 AS period_start,
    COUNT(DISTINCT i.value:"field") AS inventor_count
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."inventor") i
  WHERE t1."country_code" = 'CA' 
    AND i.value:"field" IS NOT NULL 
    AND t1."publication_date" >= 19600000 
    AND t1."publication_date" <= 20201231
  GROUP BY period_start
)
SELECT
  period_start AS period,
  AVG(inventor_count) AS avg_number_of_inventors,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t1."publication_number") AS total_patent_count
FROM inventor_counts
JOIN PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1
  ON FLOOR((t1."publication_date" / 10000) - 1960) / 5 * 5 + 1960 = period_start
WHERE t1."country_code" = 'CA'
GROUP BY period_start
ORDER BY period_start ASC;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -40.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH assignee_application_counts AS (
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('YEAR', TO_DATE(t1."filing_date"::TEXT, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS "year",
  a.value:"field"::STRING AS "assignee",
  COUNT(t1."application_number") AS "application_count"
FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1,
LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."assignee") a
WHERE t1."application_kind" = 'A61'
GROUP BY "year", "assignee"
)
SELECT
  "year",
  "assignee",
  "application_count"
FROM assignee_application_counts
ORDER BY "application_count" DESC
LIMIT 1;
selection_reason: Candidate 3 (strategy=cte_first) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates
